examples: So they sent for the notary and the deed was made, and the Seigneur signed it on the wash-basin.
Then the Seigneur turned away and the baker went out discouraged, for he did not know what to do.
Bertrand Russell was dazzled by him; T.S. Eliot called him a "grand Seigneur, the grandest I have ever met."
They objected that Sark's hereditary seigneur and seneschal will still have an unelected role in government.
Those changes did not include the abolition of the feudal roles of Seigneur and Seneschal.
